title: Santa's Lost Gifts
description: Help Santa and get Presents for Christmas!
body:
Find Lost Gifts

Santa's been accidentally dropping gifts on his trips! He has asked for help collecting them. There are several different rarities of presents that you can find which yield more Lost Gifts!


Return Lost Gifts to your local Elfager

Find an Elfager at a Village near you to return the Lost Gifts that you have retrieved. In return, they give you a gift of your own!


Open your Presents!

Open your presents by right-clicking them while they're in your hand. More expensive presents give better rewards.

DanMizu©
